scope: RV8GR physical evidence capture prepared from the canonical real-build timing log
claim_boundary: This artifact is a blank capture contract. Null measured values and missing capture files are failures of completeness, never passes.

run_order.stage_rule: Complete stages 1 through 6 in order. A stage must pass at 100 manual ticks and 50 kHz before advancing that stage to MHz profiles or enabling the next stage.

profile_rules.manual_push_switch_100_ticks: Required at every voltage; exactly 100 accepted edges and 100 expected state advances.
profile_rules.50_khz: Required at every voltage and must pass before 1 MHz.
profile_rules.1_mhz: Required at every voltage; this is the official target qualification profile.
profile_rules.2_mhz: Stress profile, attempted only after the same stage passes 1 MHz at that voltage.
profile_rules.5_mhz: Optional PCB or short-wire experiment only; never the student baseline and attempted only after 2 MHz passes at that voltage.

manual_edge_integrity.formula: accepted_clock_edges == commanded_ticks && state_advances == commanded_ticks && double_triggers == 0 && missed_ticks == 0

bus_turnaround_deadband.formula: measured_deadband_ns = new_driver_enable_crossing_ns - old_driver_high_z_ns; pass iff measured_deadband_ns > 0 && measured_deadband_ns >= selected_old_driver_output_float_limit_ns + selected_new_driver_enable_skew_limit_ns
bus_turnaround_deadband.strictness: Equality is accepted only for the source-backed limits; any negative or unknown margin fails. Record threshold method and both raw timestamps.

register_setup.formula: measured_setup_margin_ns = active_clock_edge_ns - data_stable_ns - required_setup_ns; pass iff measured_setup_margin_ns >= 0

register_hold.formula: measured_hold_margin_ns = data_last_stable_after_edge_ns - active_clock_edge_ns - required_hold_ns; pass iff measured_hold_margin_ns >= 0

propagation_to_destination.formula: measured_propagation_ns = destination_threshold_crossing_ns - source_threshold_crossing_ns; pass iff destination data/control is stable by active_clock_edge_ns - required_setup_ns and remains stable through active_clock_edge_ns + required_hold_ns

supply_margin.formula: pass iff measured supply at source and far IC remain within the selected installed-part datasheet operating range for the entire capture; setpoint alone is insufficient

memory_marking_match.formula: pass iff photographed or transcribed full top marking uniquely maps to the exact datasheet timing row used by every memory formula

run_complete.formula: pass iff every required field is non-null, every required capture file exists, every applicable formula passes, and no stop condition is active

stop_conditions.condition: VCC at source or far IC leaves the installed-part operating range.
stop_conditions.action: Stop clock, remove power if needed, correct power distribution, and restart at stage 1 manual 5.0 V.

stop_conditions.condition: Clock/reset is non-monotonic, has a runt pulse, double-triggers, misses a tick, or releases reset ambiguously.
stop_conditions.action: Do not attach downstream stages or increase frequency; repair clock/reset and repeat stage 1.

stop_conditions.condition: Any T0/T1/T2 sample is zero-hot or multi-hot after reset qualification.
stop_conditions.action: Stop progression and repeat stage 1 ring-counter diagnosis.

stop_conditions.condition: Two output drivers overlap, measured deadband is negative/unknown, a bus voltage is intermediate unexpectedly, or an IC heats.
stop_conditions.action: Stop clock and power; do not rerun until ownership/control wiring is corrected, then restart the affected stage at manual 5.0 V.

stop_conditions.condition: Any setup or hold formula is negative or required timestamps are unavailable.
stop_conditions.action: Do not increase frequency; identify the path and rerun at the previous passing profile after correction.

stop_conditions.condition: EEPROM or SRAM marking cannot be mapped to the timing row used in calculations.
stop_conditions.action: Do not run memory stages above 50 kHz and do not claim memory timing pass.

stop_conditions.condition: Observed state differs from the stage's expected count/load/instruction/IRQ behavior.
stop_conditions.action: Stop timing qualification; treat as wiring or logic debug and rerun from that stage's manual profile.

stop_conditions.condition: A required field, raw timestamp, probe mapping, or capture file is missing.
stop_conditions.action: Record result as not_measured or fail; never infer pass from a later functional result.

stages.name: clock_reset_ring_counter
stages.advance_gate: All required checks pass at manual 100 ticks and 50 kHz at 5.0 V before stage 2 is connected or qualified.

stages.name: program_counter_branch_jump
stages.advance_gate: Count, hold, direct load, BEQ, BNE, and J each change only on the intended edge with non-negative setup/hold margin.

stages.name: memory_buses_address_mux
stages.advance_gate: Memory markings match selected rows, every observed IBUS/DBUS transition has one owner, and read data meets destination setup/hold.

stages.name: instruction_alu_accumulator_zero
stages.advance_gate: U5/U6 and AC/Z capture only on intended edges; LI, ADDI, SUBI, XORI, and branch-after-Z pass by single-step before oscillator runs.

stages.name: page_store_load_full_system
stages.advance_gate: SETPG/SETDP edge behavior, store write setup, RAM read setup, boot, $AA marker, RAM marker, and page-jump marker all pass.

stages.name: irq_and_rv8_bus
stages.advance_gate: EI sets IE, /IRQ LOW holds, release latches IRQ_FF, PC does not auto-jump, and external devices never overlap a CPU or memory DBUS owner.
